data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for conversion attribution from wishlist to checkout.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for 'Conversion attribution from wishlist to checkout'. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the conversion process from the wishlist to checkout. The prior steps focus on other aspects of the saga lifecycle, indicating a gap in coverage for this specific requirement.
gaps: No evidence of conversion attribution from wishlist to checkout being validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the conversion attribution from wishlist to checkout.
